creator: adamw@FreeBSD.org
text:
Committed with some small modifications. Good work on this patch, Marco, and thanks for being patient.

The iregex prevented the new .sample file from being installed, so I simplified it by removing the only file we don't care about and then just installing everything. As a bonus that lets us simplify the rest of the Makefile and the plist.

I am uncomfortable reassigning maintainership from a committer without his approval. John is part of portmgr; I'll leave it up to him to decide what the right thing is to do there.
